fields.label: App ID
fields.description: The Feishu custom app app_id used to fetch tenant_access_token. Find it in the app credentials page at https://open.feishu.cn/app.

fields.label: App Secret
fields.description: The Feishu custom app app_secret used to fetch tenant_access_token. Copy it from the app credentials page at https://open.feishu.cn/app.

actions.name: add_message_reaction
actions.description: Add one emoji reaction to a Feishu/Lark message.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to react to.

emojiType.description: The Feishu emoji type to add.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding a Feishu message reaction.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

action_time.description: The reaction action time in milliseconds.

actions.name: download_file
actions.description: Download one Feishu/Lark file by file key and upload it to transit storage.

fileKey.description: The Feishu file key to download.

fileName.description: The optional file name to use for the downloaded transit file.

inputSchema.description: Input for downloading one Feishu file.

fileKey.description: The Feishu file key that was downloaded.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the file.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to connector transit storage.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

actions.name: download_image
actions.description: Download one Feishu/Lark image by image key and upload it to transit storage.

imageKey.description: The Feishu image key to download.

fileName.description: The optional file name to use for the downloaded transit file.

inputSchema.description: Input for downloading one Feishu image.

imageKey.description: The Feishu image key that was downloaded.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the file.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to connector transit storage.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded image.

actions.name: edit_message
actions.description: Edit a Feishu/Lark text or post message sent by the app bot.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to edit.

msgType.description: The Feishu message type supported by the edit endpoint.

anyOf.description: A pre-serialized Feishu message content JSON string.
A Feishu message content object that will be JSON-stringified.

inputSchema.description: Input for editing a Feishu message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The message creation timestamp in milliseconds.

update_time.description: The message update timestamp in milliseconds.

deleted.description: Whether the message has been recalled or deleted.

updated.description: Whether the message has been updated.

sender_type.description: The sender type such as user or app.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the sender.

content.description: The serialized Feishu message content JSON string.

id.description: The mentioned user or bot identifier.

id_type.description: The identifier type of the mentioned user or bot.

name.description: The display name of the mentioned user or bot.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the mentioned user or bot.

mentions.description: The mentions contained in the message.

upper_message_id.description: The parent message identifier for merge-forward payloads.

outputSchema.description: A Feishu message API response envelope.

actions.name: get_chat
actions.description: Fetch one Feishu/Lark chat by chat_id.

chatId.description: The Feishu chat ID to fetch.

userIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching a Feishu chat.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

actions.name: get_message
actions.description: Fetch one Feishu/Lark message by message_id.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to fetch.

userIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

cardMsgContentType.description: Return the original card JSON when the target message is a card.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching a Feishu message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The message creation timestamp in milliseconds.

update_time.description: The message update timestamp in milliseconds.

deleted.description: Whether the message has been recalled or deleted.

updated.description: Whether the message has been updated.

sender_type.description: The sender type such as user or app.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the sender.

content.description: The serialized Feishu message content JSON string.

id.description: The mentioned user or bot identifier.

id_type.description: The identifier type of the mentioned user or bot.

name.description: The display name of the mentioned user or bot.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the mentioned user or bot.

mentions.description: The mentions contained in the message.

upper_message_id.description: The parent message identifier for merge-forward payloads.

items.description: The messages returned for the queried message ID.

actions.name: list_chat_members
actions.description: List visible members in one Feishu/Lark chat.

chatId.description: The Feishu chat ID to inspect.

memberIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Feishu chat members.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

actions.name: list_chats
actions.description: List chats that the Feishu/Lark app bot currently belongs to.

userIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

sortType.description: The sort order used for listing chats.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Feishu chats.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the chat.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

actions.name: list_message_reactions
actions.description: List emoji reactions on one Feishu/Lark message.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to inspect.

reactionType.description: Filter by one Feishu emoji type.

userIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Feishu message reactions.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

action_time.description: The reaction action time in milliseconds.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

actions.name: list_messages
actions.description: List Feishu/Lark history messages from a chat or thread.

containerIdType.description: The Feishu container type to read history from.

containerId.description: The Feishu chat or thread identifier.

startTime.description: A millisecond or second timestamp encoded as a string.

endTime.description: A millisecond or second timestamp encoded as a string.

sortType.description: The sort order used for listing history messages.

cardMsgContentType.description: Return the original card JSON when the target message is a card.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Feishu history messages.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

has_more.description: Whether another history page is available.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

create_time.description: The message creation timestamp in milliseconds.

update_time.description: The message update timestamp in milliseconds.

deleted.description: Whether the message has been recalled or deleted.

updated.description: Whether the message has been updated.

sender_type.description: The sender type such as user or app.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the sender.

content.description: The serialized Feishu message content JSON string.

id.description: The mentioned user or bot identifier.

id_type.description: The identifier type of the mentioned user or bot.

name.description: The display name of the mentioned user or bot.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the mentioned user or bot.

mentions.description: The mentions contained in the message.

upper_message_id.description: The parent message identifier for merge-forward payloads.

items.description: The history messages returned by Feishu.

data.description: The paginated Feishu message list payload.

actions.name: list_pins
actions.description: List pin records in one Feishu/Lark chat and time window.

chatId.description: The Feishu chat ID to inspect.

startTime.description: A millisecond or second timestamp encoded as a string.

endTime.description: A millisecond or second timestamp encoded as a string.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Feishu pin records.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The pin creation time in milliseconds.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

actions.name: pin_message
actions.description: Pin one Feishu/Lark message inside its chat.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to pin.

inputSchema.description: Input for pinning a Feishu message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The pin creation time in milliseconds.

actions.name: recall_message
actions.description: Recall one Feishu/Lark message that the app bot sent.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to recall.

inputSchema.description: Input for recalling a Feishu message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

actions.name: remove_message_reaction
actions.description: Remove one Feishu/Lark message reaction by reaction_id.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to update.

reactionId.description: The Feishu reaction ID to remove.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing a Feishu message reaction.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

actions.name: remove_pin
actions.description: Remove the pin state from one Feishu/Lark message.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to unpin.

inputSchema.description: Input for removing a Feishu message pin.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

actions.name: reply_message
actions.description: Reply to an existing Feishu/Lark message as the app bot.

messageId.description: The Feishu message ID to reply to.

msgType.description: The Feishu message type to send in the reply.

anyOf.description: A pre-serialized Feishu message content JSON string.
A Feishu message content object that will be JSON-stringified.

replyInThread.description: Whether Feishu should create the reply inside the thread.

uuid.description: The optional Feishu deduplication UUID for this reply.

inputSchema.description: Input for replying to a Feishu message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The message creation timestamp in milliseconds.

update_time.description: The message update timestamp in milliseconds.

deleted.description: Whether the message has been recalled or deleted.

updated.description: Whether the message has been updated.

sender_type.description: The sender type such as user or app.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the sender.

content.description: The serialized Feishu message content JSON string.

id.description: The mentioned user or bot identifier.

id_type.description: The identifier type of the mentioned user or bot.

name.description: The display name of the mentioned user or bot.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the mentioned user or bot.

mentions.description: The mentions contained in the message.

upper_message_id.description: The parent message identifier for merge-forward payloads.

outputSchema.description: A Feishu message API response envelope.

actions.name: search_chats
actions.description: Search chats visible to the Feishu/Lark app bot by keyword.

userIdType.description: The user identifier type returned by Feishu read APIs.

inputSchema.description: Input for searching visible Feishu chats.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the chat.

page_token.description: The pagination token for the next page.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a Feishu/Lark app bot message to a user or chat.

receiveIdType.description: The identifier type used by receiveId.

receiveId.description: The target user or chat identifier.

msgType.description: The Feishu message type to send.

anyOf.description: A pre-serialized Feishu message content JSON string.
A Feishu message content object that will be JSON-stringified.

uuid.description: The optional Feishu deduplication UUID for this message.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu app bot message.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

create_time.description: The message creation timestamp in milliseconds.

update_time.description: The message update timestamp in milliseconds.

deleted.description: Whether the message has been recalled or deleted.

updated.description: Whether the message has been updated.

sender_type.description: The sender type such as user or app.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the sender.

content.description: The serialized Feishu message content JSON string.

id.description: The mentioned user or bot identifier.

id_type.description: The identifier type of the mentioned user or bot.

name.description: The display name of the mentioned user or bot.

tenant_key.description: The tenant key of the mentioned user or bot.

mentions.description: The mentions contained in the message.

upper_message_id.description: The parent message identifier for merge-forward payloads.

outputSchema.description: A Feishu message API response envelope.

actions.name: upload_file
actions.description: Upload one public file URL to Feishu/Lark and return the file key for message sending.

fileUrl.description: The public file URL to download and upload to Feishu.

fileType.description: The Feishu file type used by the file upload API.

fileName.description: The optional file name to send to Feishu. Inferred from the URL when omitted.

duration.description: The optional duration in milliseconds for audio or video uploads.

inputSchema.description: Input for uploading one file to Feishu.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

file_key.description: The Feishu file key returned by the upload API.

actions.name: upload_image
actions.description: Upload one public image URL to Feishu/Lark and return the image key for message sending.

imageUrl.description: The public image URL to download and upload to Feishu.

inputSchema.description: Input for uploading one image to Feishu.

code.description: The Feishu API code. 0 means success.

image_key.description: The Feishu image key returned by the upload API.
